ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "user1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the conversation */,
  "user2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the conversation */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of conversation (e.g., private, group) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the conversation started */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or subject of the conversation */,
  "last_message_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last message in the conversation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the conversation is active */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the conversation (relevant for group conversations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user1_id FOREIGN KEY ("user1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_mode FOREIGN KEY ("mode") REFERENCES conversation_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user2_id FOREIGN KEY ("user2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "msg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "conv_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the message belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was read by the recipient */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last edited */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the message has been deleted */,
  "parent_msg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent message (for threaded conversations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_conv_id FOREIGN KEY ("conv_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the friendship */,
  "user2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the friendship */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user2_id FOREIGN KEY ("user2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user1_id FOREIGN KEY ("user1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow relationship was created */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the followed user has a private profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocked_users" (
  "blocked_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blocked user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user blocking */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being blocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the block was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blocked_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the conversation mode (e.g., private, group) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversation mode */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the conversation mode */,
  "requires_approval" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if new participants need approval to join the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being reported */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
